final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a scientifically accurate astronomical visualization of the Milky Way galactic center.

Style/medium: scientific visualization combining Hubble Space Telescope and James Webb Space Telescope imaging aesthetics, photorealistic astrophotography with data-driven accuracy
Composition: wide-field cosmic vista centered on Sagittarius A*, deep space perspective with foreground nebula pillars and distant merging galaxies
Subject: supermassive black hole at center surrounded by luminous accretion disk emitting intense orange-red and white radiation, gravitational lensing creating perfect Einstein rings from background starlight
Scene/backdrop: galactic core region with billions of stars ranging from blue-white young hot stars to orange-red aging giants, dense starfield creating brilliant sea of stars, massive ionized gas pillars extending from frame edges, two distant galaxies in collision with spectacular tidal tails
Lighting/mood: black hole accretion disk as primary light source, intense radiation glow, gravitational lensing warping background light, deep space darkness punctuated by stellar brilliance
Color palette: deep space black as foundation, orange-red and white from accretion disk, blue-white young stars, orange-red aging giants, red/orange/purple emission nebulae, scattered star points across spectrum
Materials/textures: gaseous accretion disk with turbulent plasma, ionized hydrogen emission nebulae, stellar atmospheres, gravitational lensing distortion patterns
Constraints: scientifically accurate representation of black hole physics including event horizon shadow and photon ring, realistic stellar populations, accurate emission nebula colors based on ionization states
Avoid: fantasy elements, impossible physics, lens flare artifacts, oversaturated colors beyond spectroscopic accuracy, watermark, 8K stuffer terms
